caption: A man with a dark complexion wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVE DO SMTH" is seated in a room that appears to be a studio or clothing store. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background is filled with framed photographs on the wall and clothing racks with garments, including white t-shirts on mannequins. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left and the red text "BOSS LY FE" on the right. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts; he begins by looking slightly to the side with a neutral expression, then shifts his gaze and begins to smile. By the final frames, he looks downward and closes his eyes while maintaining a smirk.
